Keep experience lanes separated

Chat, Zen, Coffee, and Sandbox stay separated by server guardrails and UI expectations. Advanced runtime knobs belong in Sandbox, while companion and group-chat lanes preserve their own focused behavior.

Home / Decisions
DecisionFor everyone uxarchitecture

Context

Prism serves both utility and experience, so runtime controls and bot orchestration can easily blur the purpose of each mode if they share too much surface behavior.

Decision

Chat, Zen, Coffee, and Sandbox stay separated by server guardrails and UI expectations. Advanced runtime knobs belong in Sandbox, while companion and group-chat lanes preserve their own focused behavior.

Consequences

New features should choose the correct lane instead of becoming universal controls. This keeps user mental models understandable and helps agents avoid cross-mode regressions.
